original_prompt: Fix back button, location display, data capture, timeline alignment, and add loading on submit.
rephrased_goal: Polish the Leads UX: fix navigation, mapping, data persistence, and UI alignment while adding interactive feedback.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fix back button in Lead Detail
subtasks_required: Update back button event to use programmatic navigation to #leads
tasks.testing_criteria: Clicking back button returns to leads pipeline.

subtasks_required: Confirm view switches back without full page reload errors
tasks.testing_criteria: Leads view loads correctly after back.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fix location display in Lead Detail
subtasks_required: Ensure Leaflet map initializes with markers from lead branches data
tasks.testing_criteria: Markers appear on the map in lead detail view.
Map is visible and correctly cented on markers.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Improve data capture in Leads New
subtasks_required: Explicitly pull data from form before saving
tasks.testing_criteria: Newly created leads have all fields populated in database.

subtasks_required: Create test lead and check db record
tasks.testing_criteria: CR number, Merchant Name, and Custom Data are present.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Fix timeline alignment and add loading states
tasks.testing_criteria: Timeline looks aligned. Button shows spinner on click.
Entire leads flow is polished and functional.
